actions.description: Twentieth board meeting. Gate 2 complete — all 6/6 pivot impact assessments received. Advancing to Gate 3 (execution plan). PM tasked with consolidation. Board vote (Gate 4) targeted next cycle. 7 games, 14 clean QA cycles, zero bugs.

nextStep: Next meeting: review PM execution plan, conduct Gate 4 board vote on vanilla-js-restructure pivot.
